moments.title: England's World Cup Opener
moments.blurb: England begin their FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign against Croatia in Dallas, kicking off at 9pm UK time on Wednesday.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: It's finally here! England kick off their World Cup journey against Croatia tomorrow night. Are you ready for the Three Lions to roar?

angles.name: Match Day Build Up
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the wait is over. England v Croatia, 9pm. Where will you be watching? Predictions, please!

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Isle of Wight Festival begins on Thursday, running until Sunday, with headliners including Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, and The Cure.

angles.name: Festival Start
angles.copy: Isle of Wight Festival, we're ready for you! The gates open Thursday for a massive weekend with Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, The Cure and more.

angles.name: Headliner Hype
angles.copy: Who are you most excited to see at Isle of Wight Festival this weekend? From pop to rock legends, it's all happening on the island!

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Returns to Glasgow
moments.blurb: TRNSMT Festival takes over Glasgow Green from Friday to Sunday, featuring headliners Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Glasgow Get Ready
angles.copy: Glasgow, it's almost time! TRNSMT Festival kicks off Friday with Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, Lewis Capaldi and more taking the stage.

angles.name: Scottish Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Who's heading to Glasgow Green for TRNSMT this weekend? Three days of incredible live music await!

moments.title: Royal Ascot Begins
moments.blurb: The prestigious Royal Ascot horse racing festival starts today and runs until June 20, with Ladies Day on Thursday.

angles.name: Race Day Glamour
angles.copy: Hats at the ready! Royal Ascot kicks off today, bringing five days of world-class racing and iconic fashion.

angles.name: Ladies Day Anticipation
angles.copy: The greatest flat race meeting in the world begins! All eyes on Ascot this week, especially for Ladies Day on Thursday.

moments.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup in England
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup is currently underway in England, running until July 5th, with matches across various cities.

angles.name: Cricket Action
angles.copy: The best in women's cricket are battling it out in England for the ICC Women's T20 World Cup! Catch the action as it unfolds.

angles.name: Home Soil Hopes
angles.copy: England is hosting the ICC Women's T20 World Cup! Who are you backing to lift the trophy on home soil?

moments.title: Love Island Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, as a new batch of singletons look for romance in Mallorca.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of drama from the Love Island villa! Who's coupling up and who's cracking on tonight?

angles.name: Daily Recaps
angles.copy: Are you hooked on the new series of Love Island? Catch up on all the latest from Mallorca before tonight's episode!

moments.title: Clarkson's Farm Season 5 Finale
moments.blurb: The final episodes (7-8) of Clarkson's Farm Season 5 premiere on Prime Video tomorrow, concluding Jeremy's latest Diddly Squat adventures.

angles.name: Farm Finale
angles.copy: Get ready for the finale! Episodes 7 & 8 of Clarkson's Farm Season 5 drop tomorrow. What chaos will Jeremy and Kaleb get into this time?

angles.name: Diddly Squat Drama
angles.copy: The end is nigh for Clarkson's Farm Season 5! Don't miss the final two episodes hitting Prime Video tomorrow.

moments.title: Paul McCartney's 84th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary musician Paul McCartney, co-founder of The Beatles, turns 84 on Thursday, June 18.

angles.name: Living Legend
angles.copy: Happy 84th birthday to the one and only Sir Paul McCartney on Thursday! From The Beatles to Wings and beyond, a true icon.

angles.name: Beatles Icon
angles.copy: On Thursday, we celebrate Paul McCartney turning 84. What's your favourite song from the legendary songwriter?

moments.title: Lionel Richie's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Music superstar Lionel Richie, known for his incredible solo career and work with The Commodores, turns 77 on Saturday, June 20.

angles.name: All Night Long
angles.copy: Can you believe Lionel Richie will be 77 on Saturday? Get ready to celebrate the legend's birthday with some classic hits!

angles.name: Soulful Sounds
angles.copy: On Saturday, we're wishing a very happy 77th birthday to Lionel Richie! Which of his timeless tracks is your absolute favourite?

moments.title: Summer Solstice 2026
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the UK, occurs on Sunday, June 21, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready for maximum daylight! Sunday is the Summer Solstice, the longest day of the year. How will you be celebrating?

angles.name: Embrace Summer
angles.copy: The official start of astronomical summer is this Sunday with the Summer Solstice! Enjoy those long, light evenings.

moments.title: Golowan Festival Kicks Off in Penzance
moments.blurb: Penzance's traditional Golowan Festival, celebrating the summer solstice with music and dancing, begins on Friday, June 19, and runs until June 28.

angles.name: Cornish Celebrations
angles.copy: Penzance, get ready to party! The Golowan Festival kicks off Friday, bringing traditional music, dance, and a vibrant celebration of summer to Cornwall.

angles.name: Summer Solstice Fun
angles.copy: Celebrating the summer solstice the Cornish way! The Golowan Festival starts Friday in Penzance, promising a week of joyful festivities.

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper's 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Iconic 80s pop star Cyndi Lauper, known for hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', celebrates her 73rd birthday on Sunday, June 22.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: On Sunday, let's wish a very happy 73rd birthday to the one and only Cyndi Lauper! Girls (and boys) still just wanna have fun!

angles.name: Timeless Pop
angles.copy: Cyndi Lauper turns 73 this Sunday! Which of her colourful hits is your absolute favourite? Tell us!

moments.title: Mick Fleetwood's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary drummer and co-founder of Fleetwood Mac, Mick Fleetwood, celebrates his 79th birthday on Tuesday, June 24.

angles.name: Fleetwood Mac Legend
angles.copy: On Tuesday, we're celebrating the 79th birthday of the iconic Mick Fleetwood! What a career, what a drummer.

angles.name: Drumming Icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to Mick Fleetwood on Tuesday! What's your go-to Fleetwood Mac track?

moments.title: Taylor Swift's Latest UK Number 1
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' has become her seventh UK number one single, following its release as part of the Toy Story 5 soundtrack.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Another week, another Taylor Swift triumph! 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is her latest UK number one. Have you heard it?

angles.name: Swiftie Success
angles.copy: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' from the Toy Story 5 soundtrack has hit number one! What a run of success for the superstar.

moments.title: Gallagher Premiership Final
moments.blurb: The Gallagher Premiership Final 2026, the pinnacle of the rugby season, takes place on Saturday, June 20, at Allianz Stadium, Twickenham.

angles.name: Rugby Showdown
angles.copy: It's the biggest day in club rugby! The Gallagher Premiership Final takes place this Saturday at Twickenham. Who are you backing?

angles.name: Twickenham Roar
angles.copy: The Gallagher Premiership Final is almost here! Get ready for a thrilling day of rugby at Allianz Stadium this Saturday.

moments.title: HSBC Championships (WTA Tennis)
moments.blurb: The HSBC Championships, part of the WTA tour, continues at the historic Queen's Club in London until June 21, featuring world-class grass-court tennis.

angles.name: Tennis in London
angles.copy: Elite tennis action is heating up at Queen's Club! The HSBC Championships continue in London until Sunday.

angles.name: Grass Court Excitement
angles.copy: Catch some of the world's best female tennis players at the HSBC Championships in London this week!

moments.title: England vs Ghana World Cup Match
moments.blurb: England faces Ghana in their second FIFA World Cup group stage match, kicking off at 9pm UK time on Tuesday, June 23, in Boston.

angles.name: Second Group Game
angles.copy: After Croatia, England take on Ghana next Tuesday in their second World Cup group match! Can they secure another three points?

angles.name: Midweek Football
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! England vs Ghana, Tuesday June 23rd at 9pm. Another big World Cup night awaits.

moments.title: The Capture Season 3 Debuts
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated third season of the techno-thriller 'The Capture' premieres with all episodes on Thursday, June 18, likely on BBC iPlayer in the UK.

angles.name: New Thriller Series
angles.copy: Get ready for more deepfake deception! The Capture Season 3 drops this Thursday. Who's excited for the return of the gripping thriller?

angles.name: Binge Watch Alert
angles.copy: Clear your schedules! All episodes of The Capture Season 3 arrive this Thursday. Time to dive back into the world of manipulated reality.
